zh.lifeSummary: 當Esquire Thomas Berney於1383年出生在英國諾福爾可利德哈姆時，他的父親John Berney21歲，母親Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham22歲。他於大約1420年與Elizabeth or Eva Clipsby在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1441年在他的家鄉享年58歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可利德哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Esquire Thomas Berney于1383年出生在英国諾福爾可利德哈姆时，他的父亲John Berney21岁，母亲Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham22岁。他于大约1420年与Elizabeth or Eva Clipsby在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1441年在他的家乡享年58岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可利德哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Berney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Biorna ‘son of Biorna’. See Burney 2 and McBurney .
French: from a derivative of the personal name Bernard or any other name composed of the ancient Germanic element ber(n) ‘bear’.

variants.name: Burney
meanings: English (northern, of Norman origin): habitational name from Bernay in Eure, France, named with a Gaulish personal name Brenno + the locative suffix -acum.
Irish (Antrim) and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Biorna ‘son of Biorna’, a Gaelic form of the Old Norse personal name Bjarni (from björn ‘bear cub, warrior’).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Esquire Thomas Berney was born in 1383, in Reedham, Norfolk, England, his father, John Berney, was 21 and his mother, Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham, was 22. He married Elizabeth or Eva Clipsby about 1420, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1441, in his hometown, at the age of 58, and was buried in Reedham, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Esquire Thomas Berney est né en 1383, à Reedham, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, John Berney, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth or Eva Clipsby environ 1420, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1441, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Reedham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Esquire Thomas Berney 1383 in Reedham, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Berney 21 und seine Mutter Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham 22. Er hat um 1420 in England, United Kingdom Elizabeth or Eva Clipsby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1441 im Alter von 58 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Reedham, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Esquire Thomas Berney è nato il nel 1383 nel Reedham, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, John Berney, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth or Eva Clipsby circa 1420, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1441, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Reedham, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Esquire Thomas Berneyが1383年にイギリスノーフォルクレエドハムで生まれた時，父John Berneyは21歳，母Isabel Elizabeth Heveninghamは22歳であった。約1420年にイギリスイギリスでElizabeth or Eva Clipsbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1441年に故郷で58歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクレエドハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Esquire Thomas Berney(이)가 1383년 영국 노르폴크 리드함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Berney(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1420년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Elizabeth or Eva Clipsby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1441년 그의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 리드함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Esquire Thomas Berney nasceu em 1383, em Reedham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Berney, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth or Eva Clipsby aproximadamente 1420, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1441, em sua cidade natal, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Reedham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Esquire Thomas Berney родился в 1383 г. в местности ридхам, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Berney было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth or Eva Clipsby около 1420 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1441 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности ридхам, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Esquire Thomas Berney nació en 1383, en Reedham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Berney, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Elizabeth or Eva Clipsby aproximadamente 1420, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1441, en su pueblo, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Reedham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
